stemHtml: Swept wings have the following properties:

options.a: More affected by turbulence and steeper slope of lift curve vs AOA.
options.b: Less affected by turbulence and steeper slope of lift curve vs AOA.
options.c: Less affected by turbulence and shallower slope of lift curve vs AOA.
options.d: More affected by turbulence and shallower slope of lift curve vs AOA.
